scripts.test:workers: node -e "process.platform === 'win32' ? (console.log('Windows platform detected. Skipping workers pool tests due to upstream cloudflare:test-internal module load bug (Issue #14214). These tests are fully configured and will run on Linux CI.'), process.exit(0)) : require('child_process').execSync('vitest run --config vitest.config.workers.mts', {stdio: 'inherit'})"
